metadata.title: ELMADHI — Understand Your Body. Coach Yourself.
metadata.description: ELMADHI is an educational fitness platform that teaches you to understand your body and become your own coach: training, nutrition, and calories tailored to your goal and your life. Join the waitlist before launch.
metadata.ogTitle: ELMADHI — Tired of paying a coach forever?
metadata.ogDescription: Learn to understand your body and coach yourself. A premium educational fitness platform. Join the waitlist.

hero.title: Tired of paying a coach for the rest of your life?
hero.copy: With ELMADHI you become your own coach. Understand what your body needs, how to train, and what to eat — based on your goal, your life, and your schedule. Simple, with zero complexity.
hero.assessmentCta: Discover What Your Body Needs — Free

problem.title: Every day a new piece of advice… and you still don't know what's right
items: Switching programs every week without knowing what's actually right?
Training hard, getting tired, but the results never come?
Don't know how much to eat or what your body really needs?
Pay a coach, then go back to square one the moment you stop?
problem.statement: The problem isn't you. The problem is a system that made you follow without ever understanding why.

solution.title: The solution isn't another program… it's understanding your body
solution.paragraphOne: ELMADHI asks about your body, your goal, your time, and your life — then gives you the path that fits you.
solution.paragraphTwo: You won't just follow blindly… you'll understand and decide for yourself.
checks: A training program around your schedule
A diet plan that fits your food and your life
Clear reasons behind every choice we make for you

inside.title: Every tool you need, in one place
inside.subtitle: Man or woman, gym or home — the platform adapts to you.

features.title: Full body analysis
features.desc: We understand your situation and goal before anything else.

features.title: Custom workout plan
features.desc: Based on your level, your time, and your available equipment.

features.title: Diet plan that fits your life
features.desc: Calories, macros, and food you can actually stick to.

features.title: Built for women
features.desc: Training and nutrition adjusted to your cycle phases.

features.title: Q&A that keeps growing
features.desc: Clear, simple answers added every week.

features.title: 10 personal questions
features.desc: Ask ELMADHI directly about your own situation.

howItWorks.title: From the first question to your first plan… the path is clear

steps.title: The free assessment
steps.desc: We define your body goal, calories, and macros.

steps.title: Join the waitlist
steps.desc: Sign up with your email to be among the first at launch.

steps.title: Complete the assessment
steps.desc: Your body, experience, time, food, and equipment.

steps.title: Your plan within an hour
steps.desc: Workout and diet, with the reason behind every choice.

steps.title: Progress and adjust
steps.desc: A new check-in and the platform updates your program.

qa.title: Every question has a clear answer
qa.copy: Whether you start training today, have spent time in the gym, train at home, man or woman… you'll find the information explained simply, correctly, and easy to apply.
questions: How do I know how many calories I need?
How do I build muscle without much fat?
How do I adjust training during my cycle?
Didn't find your question? Suggest it to us

story.title: Behind ELMADHI is a real journey
story.paragraphOne: I started sport in 2011, trained 8 years of Taekwondo and earned the black belt. Then I moved to the gym and built my body naturally, step by step, without a coach.
story.paragraphTwo: Along the way I experimented, made mistakes, and learned. Today I won't tell you "just do it like me" — I want to give you the tools to find the approach that fits your body, your age, your goal, and your life.
story.highlight: You don't have to be a pro athlete… you just need to know where to start.

waitlist.headline: Launch is coming 🚀
waitlist.text: ELMADHI is still in its first launch phase. Join the waitlist to be among the very first to try the platform and enjoy exclusive launch benefits.

result.headline: Your Assessment is Ready 👇
result.subhead: Calculated from your body and your goal — no guesswork.

explanations.cut: To reach your goal, eat around {target} kcal a day with {protein}g of protein. Stay consistent and you'll see real fat loss in about {timeline}.
explanations.lean_bulk: To build muscle cleanly, aim for around {target} kcal a day and {protein}g of protein. Give it about {timeline} of consistent training.
explanations.recomp: Your best move is a body recomposition: eat around {target} kcal with {protein}g of protein, train hard, and build muscle while losing fat over about {timeline}.
explanations.maintenance: You're in a good spot. Eat around {target} kcal a day with {protein}g of protein to maintain and feel your best.

premium.subtitle: Your free result is just the start. The complete plan comes with:

form.title: Almost there

form.successText: We saved you on the waitlist. The moment ELMADHI launches we'll message you on WhatsApp — and your result will be waiting the second you log in.
